# JeasonKim Codex Plugin Marketplace

This repository is a Codex plugin marketplace generated and maintained by Skill Flow. Its catalog is [`.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`](./.agents/plugins/marketplace.json), and every plugin package lives under [`plugins/`](./plugins/).

## For Codex Agents

When a user gives you this repository URL and asks to install a plugin, treat the repository root as a Codex marketplace. Follow these steps:

1. Identify the exact plugin requested by the user from **Available Plugins** below. Do not install every plugin unless the user explicitly asks for all of them.
2. Check whether marketplace `jeasonkim-plugins` is already configured with `codex plugin marketplace list`.
3. If it is not configured, add it:

   ```bash
   codex plugin marketplace add JeasonKim/rednote --ref main
   ```

4. If it is already configured, refresh it before installation:

   ```bash
   codex plugin marketplace upgrade jeasonkim-plugins
   ```

5. Install the requested plugin using the exact selector shown in the table, then verify the result:

   ```bash
   codex plugin add <plugin-name>@jeasonkim-plugins
   codex plugin list
   ```

6. After installation, tell the user to start a new Codex task so the plugin is loaded.

Repository: [`JeasonKim/rednote`](https://github.com/JeasonKim/rednote)  
Marketplace: `jeasonkim-plugins`  
Default ref: `main`

## Available Plugins

| Plugin | Package path | Install command | Authentication |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`wf-mr3byfwob5fe373e`](./plugins/wf-mr3byfwob5fe373e) | `./plugins/wf-mr3byfwob5fe373e` | `codex plugin add wf-mr3byfwob5fe373e@jeasonkim-plugins` | Authenticate during installation |

## 使用方法

把这个仓库链接发给 Codex，并告诉它需要安装上表中的哪个插件。例如：

> 请从这个仓库安装 `wf-mr3byfwob5fe373e` 插件。

Codex 会添加或更新 marketplace，再安装指定插件。插件更新后，重新发送同样的请求即可让 Codex 刷新 marketplace 并安装最新版本。

## Repository Layout

```text
.agents/plugins/marketplace.json  # Codex marketplace catalog
plugins/<plugin-name>/            # Installable plugin packages
README.md                         # Generated installation guide and plugin index
```

This README is regenerated from the marketplace catalog on every Skill Flow publication.
